subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the Lord of all beings as He walked within the house, gazing toward the horizon of fidelity. Exalted be He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک الوری اذ کان ماشیا فی البیت و ناظرا الی افق الوفاء تعالی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rejection, opposition and persecution
